caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, grey peaked hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio setting. He wears a white button-down shirt paired with a red and gold bow tie and a gold-colored vest. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. The background features a wall adorned with various framed photographs and some clothing items, including a garment with the "LEE" logo. A digital overlay appears on the screen, consisting of a logo with a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and "JOY FM". Across the sequence, the man remains relatively still, speaking slightly and shifting his gaze and posture minimally while facing toward the left side of the frame. The lighting remains consistent, and the camera angle is a steady medium shot.
